hooks.command: filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$filepath" in *.cls|*.trigger) echo 'Apex file: enforce bulkification, trigger-handler pattern, USER_MODE for CRUD/FLS, 4-space indent.' >&2;; *.js) dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); if [ -f "$dir"/*.html ] 2>/dev/null && [ -f "$dir"/*.js-meta.xml ] 2>/dev/null; then echo 'LWC component: use lwc:if (not if:true), wire service preferred, 2-space indent, no ternary in templates.' >&2; fi;; *.html) dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); if [ -f "$dir"/*.js-meta.xml ] 2>/dev/null; then echo 'LWC template: use lwc:if/lwc:elseif/lwc:else, no ternary operators, SLDS utility classes.' >&2; fi;; esac

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *'sf project deploy'*|*'sf metadata deploy'*|*'sf deploy'*) org=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -oP '(?<=-o\s|--target-org\s)\S+' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$org" ]; then orginfo=$(sf org display -o "$org" --json 2>/dev/null); is_sandbox=$(echo "$orginfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin).get('result',{}); print(r.get('isSandbox',False) or r.get('isScratch',False))" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$is_sandbox" = "False" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Production org detected. Per consulting governance, AI-generated code must not deploy to production. Deploy to a sandbox first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi;; esac

filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$filepath" in *.cls|*.trigger) if grep -qPz 'for\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\{[^}]*(update |insert |delete |upsert |undelete |Database\.\w+\()' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Possible SOQL/DML inside loop detected. Bulkify this code.' >&2; fi; if grep -q 'without sharing' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: "without sharing" detected. Confirm this is intentional and document the reason.' >&2; fi; if grep -qP "'(?=[a-zA-Z0-9]*[0-9])[a-zA-Z0-9]{15}'|'(?=[a-zA-Z0-9]*[0-9])[a-zA-Z0-9]{18}'" "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Possible hardcoded Salesforce ID detected. Use Custom Metadata or Custom Labels instead.' >&2; fi; if grep -qPz 'catch\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\{\s*\}' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Empty catch block detected. Log the exception or handle it explicitly.' >&2; fi; if grep -P "'[^']*'\s*\+|\+\s*'[^']*'" "$filepath" 2>/dev/null | grep -qP 'SELECT|Database\.query'; then echo 'WARNING: Possible dynamic SOQL with string concatenation. Use bind variables instead.' >&2; fi; case "$filepath" in *.trigger) logiclines=$(grep -cP '^\s*(if|for|while|switch|insert |update |delete |upsert |Database\.)' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null | head -1); logiclines=${logiclines:-0}; [ "$logiclines" -ge 3 ] && echo 'WARNING: Business logic detected in trigger body. Use a trigger handler class instead.' >&2;; esac;; esac

filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$filepath" in */lwc/*.html) if grep -qP 'if:true=|if:false=' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Legacy if:true/if:false detected in LWC template. Use lwc:if/lwc:elseif/lwc:else instead.' >&2; fi; if grep -qP '\?.*:' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null && grep -qP 'template' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Possible ternary operator in LWC template. Ternary operators are not supported in LWC templates.' >&2; fi;; *.flow-meta.xml) basename=$(basename "$filepath" .flow-meta.xml); if ! echo "$basename" | grep -qP '^[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*_[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*_[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'; then echo "WARNING: Flow name '$basename' does not follow convention: <Object>_<Action>_<Context>." >&2; fi;; esac
